subcodes.first_line: O Letter Ba! Hearken unto the Voice of Him Who calleth thee, at a time when all the hounds of earth have gathered against Him from every side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حرف الباء اسمع ندآء من ینادیک حین الذی اجتمعت علیه کلاب الارض عن کل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
